title: [IOS] Location Sharing Dialogue - Don't Allow - Cancel
scenario: User taps "Cancel" on the permission dialog after denying location sharing during onboarding and navigating to Find My Device settings, expecting to return to the Poly Lens Menu screen.
steps: During onboarding, select "Don't Allow" in the Location Sharing dialogue.
Observe the permission dialog with "Cancel" and "Enable Now" options.
expected: The user is navigated back to the Poly Lens Menu screen.
